task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `MediaGalleryItem` drag initiation to emit a multi-generation payload when the dragged item belongs to a multi-selection, while preserving the existing single-item drag payload for single selections and non-selected drags. Added a count badge to the drag preview for multi-item drags and verified the source/drop contract with the full `dragDrop.test.ts`, `MediaGalleryGrid.test.tsx`, `MediaGalleryItem.behavior.test.tsx`, `useItemInteraction.test.ts`, and `useExternalDrop.test.tsx` modules plus repository typecheck.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The drag handler now switches to `setMultiGenerationDragData(...)` only when the dragged item is itself selected and there is more than one selected item in the passed `selectedItems` prop. Otherwise it falls back to the existing single-item `setGenerationDragData(...)` path exactly; the `MediaGalleryItem` behavior test covers that fallback branch.
